calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-03-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:58am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Ellen Sarbone, appears in pro per. Respondent, Raymond H. Levy, a California corporation, appears through Raymond Levy.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

Appellant calls witness Sandy Warnick.

10:40am
matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Judgment Entered
